title: Login issue
description: User cannot log into the system using valid credentials.

title: Password reset request
description: Customer requested a password reset email.

title: Payment failed
description: Transaction failed while processing online payment.

title: Profile update error
description: Unable to save changes to customer profile.

title: Invoice download issue
description: Invoice PDF is not downloading correctly.

title: Website loading slowly
description: Customer reported slow loading times on the dashboard.

title: Email notification missing
description: Customer is not receiving email notifications.

title: Account locked
description: Multiple failed login attempts locked the account.

title: Search not working
description: Search results are empty even with valid keywords.

title: Unable to upload documents
description: File upload fails with an unknown error.

title: Billing address incorrect
description: Billing address is not updating after saving.

title: Mobile app crashes
description: App crashes immediately after launch on Android devices.

title: Two-factor authentication issue
description: OTP code is not being delivered via SMS.
